title: populus tremula var. australis
intro: Populus tremula var. australis, also known as the southern trembling aspen, is a variety of the aspen tree native to Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Populus tremula var. australis include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in traditional Australian medicine to promote overall well-being and prevent illness.
